name: A Legion of One
text: [conflict-military] Conflict Action: Choose a character alone on your side - for this conflict, that character gets +3[conflict-military]. You may remove 1 fate from that character to resolve this ability twice.

versions.flavor: “In solitude, a samurai finds the strength of his entire lineage.”

name: A Perfect Cut
text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict, choose a participating Bushi character - that character gets +2[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict. If it wins the conflict, honor it.

versions.flavor: "The quality of a warrior's skill can be measured in a single stroke" - Book of Sun Tao

name: Akodo Gunsō
text: Pride. (After this character wins a conflict, honor it. After this character loses a conflict, dishonor it.) Reaction: After this character enters play from a province – refill that province faceup.

name: Akodo Makoto
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a participating Courtier character - if that character has no fate on it, discard it. Otherwise, remove 1 fate from it.

versions.flavor: "I am sworn to the Lion. My former husband's acts with the Crane army are non of your concern."

name: Akodo Toshiro
text: Action: While this character is attacking – it gets +5[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict. Provinces cannot be broken during this conflict. At the end of the conflict, if you do not control a Commander character, discard this character.

versions.flavor: "You are the most gifted swordsman of your generation. Why must you waste your time on this cowardly art?" Akodo Gendo

name: Akodo Toturi
text: Reaction: After you claim a ring during a [conflict-military] conflict in which this character is participating – resolve that ring's effect.

versions.flavor: A lion is more than his roar, his mane, his teeth, his heart. A lion is all of these.

name: Ancestral Armory
text: Action: Sacrifice this holding, choose a Weapon attachment in your discard pile – return that attachment to your hand.

versions.flavor: "This is the spear of Matsu Okimoto. Do not dishonor his memory."

name: Assassination
text: Conflict Action: Lose 3 honor. Choose a character with printed cost 2 or lower – discard that character. (Max 1 per round.)

versions.flavor: Steel whispered through silk and flesh. In the morning, they would find the body and speak of shadows and dishonor — but tonight, the deed was done.

name: City of the Rich Frog
text: Eminent. (This province starts the game faceup and cannot be turned facedown. It cannot be a stronghold province.) After setup, fill this province to 3 cards. When you would refill this province, refill it to 3 cards instead of 1.

name: Fine Katana
text: Restricted. (No more than two restricted attachments per character.)

versions.flavor:
Immortal steel waits
Venerated divine blade
The fires of the soul

“Just as a horse must have endurance and no defects, so it is with weapons. Horses should walk strongly, and swords and companion swords should cut strongly.”
— Miyamoto Musashi

name: For Greater Glory
text: Reaction: After you break a province during a [conflict-military] conflict – place 1 fate on each Bushi character on your side. (Max 1 per conflict.)

versions.flavor: "Our names shall never be forgotten!"

name: Gifted Tactician
text: Reaction: After this character wins a [conflict-military] conflict – draw 1 card.

versions.flavor: "If you are fighting only the present battle, you have already lost the war." - Kitsu Motso

name: Hayaken no Shiro
text: Action: Bow this stronghold. Choose a Bushi character with printed cost 2 or lower - ready that character.

name: Honorable Challenger
text: Pride. Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel - resolve the duel. The duel's winner does not bow as a result of this conflict's resolution.

name: Honored General
text: During a conflict in which this character is participating, each other participating [clan-lion] character you control gets +1[conflict-military]. Reaction: After this character enters play – honor it.

versions.flavor: A true leader does not command courage — she inspires it.

name: Ikoma Reservist
text: This character gets 2[conflict-military] while you have claimed the [element-fire] or [element-water] ring.

versions.flavor: "Take arms! The Unicorn are at our door!"

name: Ikoma Tsanuri
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, if you control 3 or more participating Bushi characters - until the end of the conflict, each participating character you control gets +1 [conflict-military] and +1 [conflict-political].

name: Ikoma Ujiaki
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, lose 2 honor - switch the conflict type (The conflict retains its element).

versions.flavor: "Our service to the throne has never wavered."

name: Illustrious Forge
text: Reaction: After this province is revealed - search the top 5 cards of your conflict deck for an attachment and put it into play attached to a character you control. Shuffle.

name: In Service to My Lord
text: This card can be played from your discard pile. Action: Bow a (friendly) non-unique character and choose a unique character - ready the chosen character. Put this card on the bottom of its owner's conflict deck.

name: Kamayari
text: Bushi character only. Restricted. Reaction: After a character triggers an ability during a conflict in which attached character is participating – bow that character.

name: Lion's Pride Brawler
text: Action: While this character is attacking, choose a character with equal or lower [conflict-military] skill than this character – bow that character.

versions.flavor: "Let me put it another way."

name: Makeshift War Camp
text: Attach to an unbroken province. Limit 1 Battlefield attachment per province. During a conflict at attached province, each participating character you control gets +2[conflict-military].

name: Manicured Garden
text: Conflict Action: Gain 1 fate.

versions.flavor: The perfect garden maintains all five elements in harmony.
“In equilibrium, beauty is revealed.”

name: Master Tactician
text: During conflicts in which this character is participating, if there is a Battlefield in play, you may look at and play the top card of your conflict deck as if it were in your hand. You cannot play more than 3 cards per round this way.

versions.flavor: "It's neither war nor peace: only order and chaos." - Akodo's Leadership

name: Matsu Beiona
text: Reaction: After this character enters play, if you control 3 or more other Bushi characters – place 2 fate on this character.

versions.flavor: When the rage surged forth, none could stand against them.
The Matsu women rule because they are strongest. No court intrigue, no clever words — only the daughter who proves herself in battle may lead the family. Fury is their teacher, war their home.

name: Matsu Gohei
text: This character does not bow as the result of conflict resolution during conflicts in which it is attacking with 2 or more other Bushi characters.

versions.flavor: "Why'd you want to fight me when you'd do such a bad job of it."

name: Matsu Koso
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating - each participating character gets -X[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict, where X is that character's printed [conflict-political] skill.

versions.flavor: "What good is an army if you don't use it?"

name: Miwaku Kabe Guard
text: Pride. (After this character wins a conflict, honor it. After this character loses a conflict, dishonor it.)

versions.flavor: "This wall is as unassailable as the honor of the Lion."

name: Ornate Fan
text: Restricted. (No more than two restricted attachments per character.)

versions.flavor: At times, the ornamentation is the point. At others, it is merely a distraction.

“There is another kind of artist, who sets more soberly about his work, striving to give real beauty to the things which men actually use and to give to them the shape which tradition has ordained.” 
— Murasaki Shikibu

name: Prepared Ambush
text: Attach to an unbroken province. Limit 1 Battlefield attachment per province. During a conflict at attached province, you may play each character in your provinces as if it were in your hand. Each character played this way must enter play in the conflict.

name: Right Hand of the Emperor
text: If you are more honorable than an opponent, you can play this card from your discard pile. Action: Choose up to 6 printed cost worth of Bushi characters you control - ready each of those characters. Put this card on the bottom of its owner's conflict deck.

versions.flavor: "Your soldiers will follow you into the darkest valley, and fight in the blackest night, if they are illuminated by your honor." - Akodo's Leadership

name: Sashimono
text: Attach to a Bushi character you control. Attached character does not bow as a result of conflict resolution during [conflict-military] conflicts.

versions.flavor: The war banner danced above the press of bodies as he fought his way through the melée. A beacon for allies and a challenge to enemies.

name: Seal of the Lion
text: Attached character gains the [clan-lion] clan symbol and the Commander trait.

versions.flavor:
In the name of His Excellency,
the Right Hand of the Emperor,
High General,
Champion of the Lion,andnDaimyō of the Akodo,Toturi, son of Daio,
son of Kozue, daughter of Yokutsune...

name: Seeker of Air
text: You may replace 1 province of any element with an additional [element-air] province while deckbuilding. Reaction: After an [element-air] province you control is revealed – gain 1 fate.

name: Shameful Display
text: Action: During a conflict at this province, choose 2 participating characters – honor one of those characters and dishonor the other.

name: Shori
text: Attach to a unique [clan-lion] character. Ancestral. Restricted. If attached character has the Champion trait, it gains "You may declare an additional [conflict-military] conflict each conflict phase."

name: Strength in Numbers
text: Action: While you are the attacking player, choose a defending character with glory X or lower – move that character home. X is equal to the number of attacking characters.

name: Tactical Ingenuity
text: Attach to a Commander character. Attached character gains: "Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating - search the top 4 cards of your conflict deck for an event, reveal it, and add it to your hand. Shuffle."

name: Tactician's Apprentice
text: Reaction: After honor dials are revealed, if your bid is lower than an opponent's – draw 1 card. (Limit once per phase.)

name: The Art of War
text: Interrupt: When this province is broken – draw 3 cards.

versions.flavor: "Let your enemy see what he wishes to see, so that he will underestimate you." - Akodo's Leadership

name: Time for War
text: Seeker role only. Reaction: After you lose a [conflict-political] conflict, choose a Bushi character you control – put a Weapon attachment with printed cost 3 or lower into play from your hand or conflict discard pile, attached to that character.

name: True Strike Kenjutsu
text: Attached character gains: "Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel - resolve the duel, using each character's base [conflict-military] instead of their total [conflict-military] skill for this duel. Bow the duel's loser."

name: Unified Company
text: No attachments except Weapon. Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, if you have fewer cards in you hand than your opponent - put a non-unique Bushi character with printed cost 2 or less into play from your dynasty discard pile.

name: Way of the Lion
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a [clan-lion] character – double that character's base [conflict-military] skill until the end of the conflict.

versions.flavor: "War is the most noble pursuit of a samurai. It gives him purpose and brings honor to his ancestors." - Akodo's Leadership
